name: E-commerce Header
description: Store header with navigation and cart
html:
{{logo}}
    {{#each navLinks}}
  • {{label}}
    • {{/each}}
{{cartText}}{{ctaText}}
css: .header { padding: 1rem 0; background: #fff; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; } .container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .header-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .logo a { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a; text-decoration: none; } .nav-links { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 2rem; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .nav-links a { color: #475569; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.2s; } .nav-links a:hover { color: #0f172a; } .header-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem; } .cart-icon { color: #0f172a; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; } .btn-primary { background: #0f172a; color: #fff; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .nav { display: none; } }

name: E-commerce Hero
description: Hero banner with featured product promotion
html:
{{badge}}

{{title}}

{{subtitle}}

{{ctaPrimary}}{{ctaSecondary}}
css: .hero { padding: 5rem 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f8fafc 0%, #e2e8f0 100%); } .container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .hero-content { max-width: 600px; } .hero-badge { display: inline-block; background: #f97316; color: #fff; padding: 0.375rem 1rem; border-radius: 2rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .hero-title { font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a; line-height: 1.1; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .hero-subtitle { font-size: 1.125rem; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 2rem; line-height: 1.6; } .hero-actions { display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; } .btn-lg { padding: 1rem 2rem; font-size: 1.125rem; } .btn-primary { background: #0f172a; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; display: inline-block; } .btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #0f172a; border: 2px solid #0f172a; border-radius: 0.5rem; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; display: inline-block; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .hero { padding: 3rem 0; } .hero-title { font-size: 2.25rem; } } @media (max-width: 320px) { .hero-title { font-size: 1.75rem; } .hero-actions { flex-direction: column; } }

subtitle.default: Curated collections of beautifully crafted goods designed to elevate your everyday life.

name: Featured Products
html:
{{title}}

{{description}}

{{#each products}}
{{title}}

{{title}}

{{price}}View Details
{{/each}}
css: .products { padding: 5rem 0; background: #fff; } .container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .section-desc { font-size: 1.125rem; color: #64748b; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; } .products-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; } .product-card { border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.5rem; overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 0.2s; } .product-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .product-image { aspect-ratio: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; } .product-placeholder { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); } .product-info { padding: 1.25rem; } .product-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .product-price { display: block; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: #f97316; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .btn-sm { display: inline-block; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: #0f172a; color: #fff; border-radius: 0.5rem; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; } @media (max-width: 1280px) { .products-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .products-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .products-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } .section-title { font-size: 2rem; } } @media (max-width: 320px) { .products-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

description.default: Handpicked favorites from our latest collection

name: E-commerce Categories
html:
{{title}}

{{#each categories}}
{{title}}

{{title}}

{{count}} products
{{/each}}
css: .categories { padding: 5rem 0; background: #f8fafc; } .container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a; } .categories-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; } .category-card { display: block; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; border-radius: 0.5rem; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.2s; } .category-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); } .category-image { aspect-ratio: 16/9; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .category-placeholder { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); } .category-info { padding: 1.25rem; background: #fff; } .category-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; } .category-count { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #64748b; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .categories-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .categories-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

name: E-commerce Testimonials
html:
{{title}}

{{#each testimonials}}
{{rating}}
"{{text}}"
{{name}}Verified Buyer
{{/each}}
css: .testimonials { padding: 5rem 0; background: #fff; } .container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .section-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a; } .testimonials-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; } .testimonial-card { background: #f8fafc; padding: 1.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; } .testimonial-rating { color: #f97316; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; font-size: 1.125rem; } .testimonial-text { color: #475569; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 1rem; font-style: italic; } .author-name { color: #0f172a; display: block; } .author-role { color: #64748b; font-size: 0.75rem; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .testimonials-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .testimonials-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

name: E-commerce CTA
html:
{{title}}

{{description}}

{{buttonText}}
css: .cta { padding: 5rem 0; background: #0f172a; color: #fff; } .container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .cta-content { text-align: center; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; } .cta-title { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .cta-desc { font-size: 1.125rem; opacity: 0.8; margin-bottom: 2rem; } .btn-primary { background: #f97316; color: #fff; padding: 1rem 2rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; display: inline-block; font-size: 1.125rem; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .cta { padding: 3rem 0; } .cta-title { font-size: 2rem; } } @media (max-width: 320px) { .cta-title { font-size: 1.5rem; } }

description.default: Join our mailing list for exclusive deals, new arrivals, and style inspiration.

name: E-commerce Newsletter Form
html:
{{title}}

{{#each fields}}
{{#if type='textarea'}}{{else}}{{/if}}
{{/each}}
css: .newsletter { padding: 4rem 0; background: #f8fafc; } .container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .newsletter-wrapper { max-width: 500px; margin: 0 auto; text-align: center; } .newsletter-title { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } .newsletter-form { display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; } .form-group { flex: 1; } .form-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.875rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 1rem; } .form-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #0f172a; } .btn-primary { background: #0f172a; color: #fff; padding: 0.875rem 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .newsletter-form { flex-direction: column; } }

name: E-commerce Footer
description: Store footer with links and policies
html:
{{logo}}

{{description}}

{{#each columns}}

{{title}}

    {{#each links}}
  • {{label}}
    • {{/each}}
{{/each}}

{{copyright}}
css: .footer { padding: 4rem 0 2rem; background: #0f172a; color: #94a3b8; } .container { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 2rem; } .footer-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 3rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; } .footer-logo { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .footer-desc { line-height: 1.6; } .footer-col-title { color: #fff; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .footer-links { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; } .footer-links li { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .footer-links a { color: #94a3b8; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .footer-links a:hover { color: #f97316; } .footer-bottom { border-top: 1px solid #334155; padding-top: 2rem; text-align: center; } .copyright { font-size: 0.875rem; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 768px) { .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

description.default: Premium curated goods for modern living. Free shipping on orders over $50.
